name: 5dim_storage
title: 5Dim's mod - Storage
author: 5Dim
description:
Storage module for 5Dim's mod
Expands storage capabilities for fluids and items
This mod includes:
- 10 tiers of storage tanks (increased capacity)
- 10 tiers of multi-connection storage tanks (connections on all sides)
- 10 tiers of steel chests (increased inventory size)
- 10 tiers of all logistic chests (if 5dim_logistic is installed)
